title: Swarm Of Bees
description: A pack where bees come in swarms!
body:
![Swarm Of Bees Logo](https://ewanhowell.com/assets/images/resourcepacks/swarm-of-bees/logo.webp)
## A pack where bees come in swarms!
[View the pack on my website!](https://ewanhowell.com/resourcepacks/swarm-of-bees)




This pack makes it so that the Bee model is a swarm of 6 small bees!
